mapper.select:
select sys_id , msg_cd , msg_nm , msg_description from sys_message sm where 1=1
and ( msg_cd like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or msg_nm like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') or msg_description like concat('%', #{searchKeyword}, '%') )
and delete_yn = 'N' order by msg_cd asc
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_message ( sys_id , msg_cd , msg_nm , msg_description , delete_yn, insert_user_id, insert_datetime , sys_plant_cd ) values
( #{item.sysId}, #{item.msgCd}, #{item.msgNm}, #{item.msgDescription}, 'N', #{userId}, now(), #{sysPlantCd} )

update.foreach: update sys_message set msg_nm = #{item.msgNm}, msg_description = #{item.msgDescription}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}

delete.foreach: update sys_message set delete_yn = #{item.deleteYn}, modify_user_id = #{userId}, modify_datetime = now() where 1=1 and sys_id = #{item.sysId}

mapper.select:
select COUNT(*) > 0 from sys_message where 1=1 and msg_cd in
#{item.msgCd}

select sys_id , msg_cd , msg_nm , msg_description from sys_message sm where 1=1 and msg_cd in
#{item.msgCd}
